headline_theme: AI in Product Management: Separating Hype from Reality
editorial: The recent advancements in AI have been making waves in the product management world. But is it all hype or is there real substance to it? In this edition, we'll explore the current state of AI in product management and what it means for PMs. We'll examine how Notion's design and product lead, Max Schoening, has been effective in getting designers and PMs to ship code, prototype in the terminal, and launch extremely successful AI products. We'll also discuss how agency—not skills—is the thing that separates people who thrive from those who fall behind in the AI era. In the world of AI, the first 10% of every project is now "free," and what that means for product development. Our must-reads include an article by Lenny's Newsletter on why cultivating agency matters more than cultivating skills in the AI era, and a guide by Statsig on how to build a great AI product if you're not an AI company. Our contrarian pick is an article by Benedict Evans on how OpenAI will compete in the market. The implications for PMs are clear: to thrive in the AI era, they need to focus on cultivating agency, not just skills. They need to understand how to build great AI products, and how to use AI to enhance their productivity, creativity, and workflow efficiency.

must_reads.title: Why cultivating agency matters more than cultivating skills in the AI era
must_reads.why: This article provides a comprehensive overview of why agency matters more than skills in the AI era, and how Notion's design and product lead, Max Schoening, has been effective in getting designers and PMs to ship code, prototype in the terminal, and launch extremely successful AI products.

must_reads.title: Lessons from Notion: How to build a great AI product, if you're not an AI company
must_reads.why: This guide provides a comprehensive overview of how to build a great AI product, even if you're not an AI company, and how Notion has been successful in building AI products.

also_worth.note: This resource provides an overview of how product teams can use artificial intelligence to enhance their productivity, creativity, and workflow efficiency.
also_worth.title: Notion AI
